metadata.title: Comprehensive Chrome Browser Testing
metadata.summary: Full browser testing of all OrchestratorAI Enterprise products — infrastructure startup, visual consistency, navigation, functionality, SSO flow, theme switching, and cross-product integration.

summary: Start all services, verify every product loads and looks correct in Chrome, test all key user flows, validate shared components across products, test dark/light themes, SSO, and cross-product navigation.

phases.label: Infrastructure Startup
phases.description: Start Supabase and all APIs/web apps. Verify every service is running on its assigned port.

steps.action: Start Supabase (REST on 54321, Postgres on 54322). Verify it's running: check health endpoint or pg_isready.
Start Auth API (port 6100). Verify: GET http://localhost:6100/health returns 200.
Start Admin API (port 6150). Verify: GET http://localhost:6150/health returns 200.
Start Forge API (port 6200). Verify: GET http://localhost:6200/health returns 200.
Start Compose API (port 6300). Verify: GET http://localhost:6300/health returns 200.
Start Pulse API (port 6500). Verify: GET http://localhost:6500/health returns 200.
Start Bridge API (port 6600). Verify: GET http://localhost:6600/health returns 200.
Start all web apps: Landing (6400), Command (6000), Admin (6101), Forge (6201), Compose (6301), Pulse (6501), Bridge (6601). Verify each responds with HTML on its port.
steps.validation: All 7 web URLs load in browser without errors

steps.action: Open Chrome DevTools on each web app briefly — check console for critical errors (red). Some warnings are OK, but no unhandled exceptions or failed module imports.
steps.validation: No critical console errors on initial load

phases.label: Landing Web (port 6400) — Public Site
phases.description: First thing visitors see. Must look polished, no auth required.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6400. Verify: hero section loads with OrchestratorAI branding, product cards visible, feature grid renders, CTA buttons present.
steps.validation: Landing page renders completely with all sections

steps.action: Test theme toggle in NavBar. Click to switch between dark and light. Verify: colors change smoothly, text remains readable, cards/sections update. Toggle back to dark.
steps.validation: Theme toggle works, both themes look polished

steps.action: Navigate to /features page. Verify: product detail sections render with descriptions for all 5 products (Forge, Compose, Pulse, Bridge, Admin).
steps.validation: Features page renders all product sections

steps.action: Navigate to /pricing page. Verify: 3 pricing tiers render (Starter, Professional, Enterprise). FAQ section visible.
steps.validation: Pricing page with 3 tiers and FAQ

steps.action: Navigate to /whats-possible page. Verify: 6 industry tabs (Legal, Marketing, Engineering, Healthcare, Finance, HR). Click each tab — agent idea cards update. Each card shows agent name, product badge, description, workflow.
steps.validation: All 6 industries load with 4 agent ideas each

steps.action: Test What's Possible section on landing page (scroll down). Verify: same interactive industry selector works inline.
steps.validation: Inline What's Possible section works on landing page

steps.action: Test Customer Service chat widget. Click the floating chat bubble (bottom right). Verify: chat panel opens, input field present. Type 'Hello, what can OrchestratorAI do?' and send. Check if response comes back from Forge API customer-service agent. (May fail if Forge API isn't fully wired for guest mode — document the result either way.)
steps.validation: Chat widget opens, message sends, response renders (or document why it fails)

steps.action: Test 'Get Started' and 'Login' CTAs. Verify they redirect to http://localhost:6000 (Command Web).
Test mobile responsive. Open Chrome DevTools, toggle device toolbar, select iPhone 14 Pro. Verify: layout adapts, NavBar hamburger menu works, sections stack vertically, text readable.

phases.label: Command Web (port 6000) — Auth + Navigation Shell
phases.description: Entry point for authenticated users. Login, SSO token, entitlements-based product launcher.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6000. Verify: redirected to login page (not authenticated yet).
Test OaiAppShell rendering on login page (if applicable) or verify login page renders cleanly with OrchestratorAI branding.
Login with test credentials. Verify: Auth API called, JWT token received, stored in localStorage (key: authToken) and cookie (orch_auth_token). Redirected to dashboard/product launcher.
steps.validation: Login succeeds, token stored in localStorage + cookie

steps.action: Verify OaiAppShell renders: top nav with product name 'Command', crawler bubble, theme toggle, user menu. Sidebar with product navigation links.
Verify product launcher / dashboard shows product tiles based on entitlements. Expected products: Forge, Compose, Admin, Pulse, Bridge. Each tile should have name, description, and link.
steps.validation: Product tiles render for entitled products

steps.action: Test theme toggle. Switch dark/light. Verify: entire shell updates (sidebar, topnav, content area, cards). Both themes polished.
steps.validation: Theme toggle works in Command shell

steps.action: Test user menu. Click user avatar/icon in top nav. Verify: popover shows user name, org name, sign out button.
Test crawler bubble. Click it in top nav. Verify: chat popover opens, can type and send a message. (Same widget as Landing but now authenticated.)
Click a product tile (e.g., Forge). Verify: navigates to http://localhost:6201. Verify SSO: Forge web should pick up the auth token from localStorage/cookie and NOT show a login page.
steps.validation: Product navigation works, SSO token carries over

steps.action: Test mobile responsive. DevTools → iPhone. Verify: sidebar collapses to hamburger menu, product tiles stack, top nav adapts.

phases.label: Admin Web (port 6101) — Platform Administration
phases.description: Full admin suite. Auth admin + platform admin via Admin API.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6101. Verify: SSO works (no login required if already logged in via Command). OaiAppShell renders with Admin sidebar.
steps.validation: Admin loads with SSO, OaiAppShell renders

steps.action: Verify sidebar navigation: Organizations, Users, Roles, Entitlements, LLM Analytics (expandable: Usage, Models, Costs), RAG Management, Agent Registry, Observability (expandable: Dashboard, Events), System (expandable: Config, Health).
steps.validation: All sidebar nav items present with correct hierarchy

steps.action: Click Organizations. Verify: org list page loads. If Supabase has data, orgs should display. If empty, verify empty state renders.
Click Users. Verify: user management page loads.
Click Roles. Verify: role management page loads.
Click Entitlements. Verify: entitlements management page loads.
Click LLM Analytics → Usage. Verify: LLM usage page loads, calls Admin API. May show empty data if no LLM calls have been made yet.
steps.validation: LLM Usage page renders (data or empty state)

steps.action: Click RAG Management. Verify: RAG collections page loads.
Click Agent Registry. Verify: agent list page loads showing agents from Forge + Compose.
Click Observability → Dashboard. Verify: observability dashboard loads.
Click System → Health. Verify: system health page loads showing status of all product APIs (green/red indicators). This calls Admin API which pings all products.
steps.validation: System Health page shows product statuses

steps.action: Test theme toggle + mobile responsive.
steps.validation: Theme and responsive work in Admin

phases.label: Forge Web (port 6201) — Complex Agent Dashboards
phases.description: LangGraph agent dashboards with SSE streaming and HITL.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6201. Verify: SSO works, OaiAppShell renders with Forge sidebar.
Verify sidebar: Marketing Swarm, Legal Department, CAD Agent, Risk Dashboard, Predictor.
Click Marketing Swarm. Verify: dashboard view loads with configuration form, progress area, results area.
Click Legal Department. Verify: legal workflow view loads.
Click CAD Agent. Verify: CAD agent view loads.
Click Risk Dashboard. Verify: risk analysis view loads with visualization components.
Click Predictor. Verify: prediction dashboard loads.

Test ClaudeCodePane. Look for the Claude toggle button (should be built into OaiAppShell). Click to open. Verify: slide-in panel appears from right, command input visible, pinned commands. Type a command and check if it connects to Admin API.
Test theme toggle + mobile responsive + crawler bubble.
steps.validation: Theme, responsive, crawler all work in Forge

phases.label: Compose Web (port 6301) — Simple Agent Conversations
phases.description: Simple runner-based agents with conversation UI.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6301. Verify: SSO works, OaiAppShell renders with Compose sidebar.
Verify sidebar: Agents, Conversations, Runner Compose.
Click Agents. Verify: agent list page loads showing available simple agents (cards or list).
Click an agent (if available). Verify: conversation view loads with message thread and input.
Click Runner Compose. Verify: pipeline builder view loads showing runner types.
Test theme + mobile + crawler + ClaudeCodePane.
steps.validation: All shared features work in Compose

phases.label: Pulse Web (port 6501) — Internal Automation
phases.description: Internal event watchers, workflows, training scenarios.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6501. Verify: SSO works, OaiAppShell renders with Pulse sidebar.
Verify sidebar: Dashboard, Listeners, Workflows, Scenarios, Stream.
Click Dashboard. Verify: event dashboard renders with listener/workflow counts.
Click Listeners. Verify: listener list renders (db-watcher, file-watcher, internal-a2a).
Click Workflows. Verify: workflow registry view renders.
Click Scenarios. Verify: 4 training scenarios render (DB change, file change, manual workflow, SSE streaming).
Click Stream. Verify: SSE stream view renders (may show 'waiting for events' if nothing is happening).
Test theme + mobile.
steps.validation: Theme and responsive work in Pulse

phases.label: Bridge Web (port 6601) — External A2A
phases.description: External A2A gateway dashboard, security, agent registry.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:6601. Verify: SSO works, OaiAppShell renders with Bridge sidebar.
Verify sidebar: Home, Registry, Inbound, Outbound, Security, Observability, Scenarios, Demo, Settings.
Click Registry. Verify: external agent registry view renders.
Click Inbound. Verify: inbound A2A view renders.
Click Security. Verify: security dashboard renders (signing, rate limiting, origin validation).
Click Scenarios. Verify: training scenarios render.
Test theme + mobile.
steps.validation: Theme and responsive work in Bridge

phases.label: Cross-Product Integration Tests
phases.description: Test SSO, navigation between products, visual consistency.

steps.action: SSO flow: Login via Command (6000). Navigate to each product (Admin, Forge, Compose, Pulse, Bridge) by clicking product tiles or typing URLs. Verify: NONE show a login page — all recognize the shared auth token.
steps.validation: SSO works across all 6 authenticated products

steps.action: Visual consistency: Open 2-3 products side by side (or quickly switch tabs). Verify: same sidebar width, same top nav height, same font, same color palette, same theme. They should look like ONE platform, not 7 separate apps.

Theme persistence: Set theme to LIGHT in Command. Navigate to Forge. Verify: Forge is also in light mode. Switch to dark in Forge. Go back to Command. Verify: Command is now dark. Theme persists across products.
Product switcher: In any product's sidebar, look for product switcher links at the bottom. Click a different product link. Verify: navigates to the correct port.
Sign out: Click sign out in any product's user menu. Verify: token cleared from localStorage and cookie. Navigate to another product — verify it redirects to login.
steps.validation: Sign out clears SSO across all products

steps.action: Admin System Health: Go to Admin → System → Health. Verify: all running products show green/healthy status. Stop one product (e.g., Compose API). Refresh health page. Verify: that product shows red/down.
steps.validation: System health accurately reflects product status

steps.action: Crawler bubble consistency: Click the crawler chat bubble in Command, then in Forge, then in Admin. Verify: same widget, same behavior, messages may or may not persist across products (both are acceptable).
steps.validation: Crawler bubble works consistently across products

phases.label: Issue Capture + Documentation
phases.description: Document all issues found during testing for systematic fixing.

steps.action: Create a testing report documenting: (1) What works, (2) What's broken with error details, (3) Visual issues (screenshots), (4) Data/schema issues discovered, (5) Missing functionality. Categorize by severity: critical (blocks usage), high (bad UX), medium (visual), low (polish).
Feed data/schema issues into Phase 6 (Supabase Pristine) plan — what tables are missing, what seed data is needed, what schema changes are required.
steps.validation: Phase 6 requirements updated with real findings

execution_strategy.notes: Test in order: Infrastructure → Landing → Command (login) → Admin → Forge → Compose → Pulse → Bridge → Cross-product. Each phase depends on the previous — especially Command (login) must work before testing authenticated products. Use Chrome DevTools throughout. Take screenshots of issues. Record GIFs of key flows using mcp__claude-in-chrome__gif_creator.
